---
name: Parser request
about: Ask for a new source parser or extractor improvement
title: "[parser] "
labels: parser
---

## Source

What file, log, or export format should BrainCore ingest?

## Sample content

Provide a minimal redacted example if possible.

## Expected output

What facts, entities, episodes, or memories should it produce?

## Expected contract

- expected `source_type`
- expected trust class
- expected fact kinds
- expected scope or project mapping
